messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a Python script using python-pptx to create a 30-slide data-heavy presentation for C-Suite executives in the Energy sector analyzing renewable investments. The output file must be named "energy_renewable.pptx" and all content should be in Mandarin Chinese. Use the standard 16:9 Widescreen slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# Slide dimensions (16:9 widescreen)
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

# Color palette
NAVY_DARK = RGBColor(0x0A, 0x24, 0x63)
NAVY_MID = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x8C)
TEAL_ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xB4, 0xD8)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF8, 0xF9, 0xFA)
GOLD_HIGHLIGHT = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xC1, 0x07)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6C, 0x75, 0x7D)

# Fonts and sizes
FONT_NAME = "Arial"
TITLE_SIZE = 44
SUBTITLE_SIZE = 28
BODY_SIZE = 18
SMALL_SIZE = 14
TINY_SIZE = 12
CARD_TITLE_SIZE = 22
STAT_NUMBER_SIZE = 36

# Layout constants
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.15)
ELEMENT_GAP = Inches(0.2)


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    """Set the background fill of a slide to a given hex color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    r = int(color_hex[1:3], 16)
    g = int(color_hex[3:5], 16)
    b = int(color_hex[5:7], 16)
    fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(r, g, b)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, color="#FFFFFF", bold=False, italic=False, alignment=None):
    """Add a formatted text box to the slide."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment or PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.color.rgb = color if isinstance(color, RGBColor) else RGBColor(int(color[1:3], 16), int(color[3:5], 16), int(color[5:7], 16))
    run.font.name = FONT_NAME
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.italic = italic
    txBox.vertical_anchor = MSO_ANCHOR.MIDDLE
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body=""):
    """Add a styled card with rounded rectangle background and text."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + CARD_PADDING, top + CARD_PADDING, width - CARD_PADDING * 2, Inches(0.4), title, font_size=CARD_TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + CARD_PADDING, top + Inches(0.5), width - CARD_PADDING * 2, height - Inches(0.6), body, font_size=BODY_SIZE, color=DARK_TEXT)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position=Inches(0.8)):
    """Add a section label with decorative line."""
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.04))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_ACCENT
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position + Inches(0.15), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), text, font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)


def add_footer(slide, text="CONFIDENTIAL | Energy Renewable Investment Analysis 2024"):
    """Add a footer to the slide."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.35), text, font_size=TINY_SIZE, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Add an image if it exists, otherwise a styled placeholder."""
    try:
        if os.path.exists(path):
            slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
        else:
            shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
            shape.fill.solid()
            shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
            shape.line.color.rgb = TEAL_ACCENT
            shape.line.width = Pt(2)
            add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Image Placeholder", font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    except Exception:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
        shape.line.color.rgb = TEAL_ACCENT
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    """Title Slide"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A2463")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "可再生能源投资分析", font_size=54, color=WHITE, bold=True, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(10), Inches(0.8), "Renewable Energy Investment Analysis 2024", font_size=28, color=TEAL_ACCENT, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(2.33), Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD_HIGHLIGHT
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.7), Inches(10), Inches(0.5), "面向企业高管的战略投资报告", font_size=22, color=RGBColor(0xCC, 0xCC, 0xCC), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.8), Inches(10), Inches(0.4), "CONFIDENTIAL | 仅供内部使用", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_02_exec_summary(prs):
    """Executive Summary"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8F9FA")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "执行摘要"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "执行摘要", font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(6), Inches(1.2), "全球可再生能源投资总额", "$1960亿美元\n同比增长38%")
    add_card(slide, Inches(7), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.8), Inches(1.2), "太阳能占比", "45%\n最大单一技术类别")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(12), Inches(0.4), "关键发现", font_size=24, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)
    bullets = [
        "• 全球可再生能源投资在2023年达到创纪录的$1960亿美元，同比增长38%",
        "• 太阳能和风能合计占总投资额的75%，是增长最快的两个领域",
        "• 亚太地区引领全球投资，占总量的42%，其次是欧洲(28%)和北美(20%)",
        "• 平均投资回报率(ROI)为10.3%，高于传统能源投资的6.8%",
        "• 预计到2030年，全球可再生能源市场规模将达到$5,200亿美元"
    ]
    y = Inches(3.4)
    for bullet in bullets:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y, Inches(12), Inches(0.35), bullet, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)
        y += Inches(0.4)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_03_market_overview(prs):
    """Market Overview"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8F9FA")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "市场概览"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "市场概览", font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    stats = [
        ("总投资额", "$196B"),
        ("年增长率", "+38%"),
        ("市场规模", "$520B (2030E)"),
        ("新增装机", "450 GW")
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.4), card_w, Inches(1.5), label, value)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(12), Inches(0.4), "市场驱动因素", font_size=24, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)
    factors = [
        "• 各国碳中和承诺推动政策支持和财政补贴",
        "• 技术进步使太阳能和风能成本下降超过60%",
        "• ESG投资需求激增，机构投资者配置比例持续提升",
        "• 能源安全考量加速可再生能源替代进程"
    ]
    y = Inches(3.7)
    for f in factors:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y, Inches(12), Inches(0.35), f, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)
        y += Inches(0.4)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_04_investment_trends_pie(prs):
    """Investment Trends by Technology - Pie Chart"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8F9FA")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "按技术类型的投资趋势"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "按技术类型的投资趋势", font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['太阳能', '风能', '水力发电', '地热', '生物质能', '氢能', '海上风电']
    chart_data.add_series('投资分布', (45, 30, 12, 6, 4, 2, 1))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(7), Inches(5.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    # Pie charts do not support legends in python-pptx; skip legend manipulation

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.2), Inches(1.4), Inches(4.5), Inches(5.5),
                 "投资分布:\n\n太阳能 45%\n风能 30%\n水力发电 12%\n地热 6%\n生物质能 4%\n氢能 2%\n海上风电 1%",
                 font_size=18, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_05_solar_title(prs):
    """Solar Energy Section Title"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A2463")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "太阳能"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "太阳能", font_size=64, color=WHITE, bold=True, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(2.33), Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD_HIGHLIGHT
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.1), Inches(10), Inches(0.8), "Solar Energy", font_size=32, color=TEAL_ACCENT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide)


def slide_06_solar_analysis(prs):
    """Solar Energy Analysis"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8F9FA")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "太阳能投资分析"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "太阳能投资分析", font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    stats = [
        ("总投资额", "$89B"),
        ("年增长率", "+67%"),
        ("平均ROI", "12%"),
        ("装机容量", "450 GW")
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.4), card_w, Inches(1.5), label, value)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(12), Inches(0.4), "关键洞察", font_size=24, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)
    insights = [
        "• 光伏组件成本十年下降超过80%，使太阳能成为最具竞争力的能源之一",
        "• 分布式太阳能系统增长迅速，户用和工商业屋顶安装量年增55%",
        "• 钙钛矿电池技术突破有望将转换效率提升至30%以上",
        "• 储能配套投资快速增长，解决间歇性问题"
    ]
    y = Inches(3.7)
    for insight in insights:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y, Inches(12), Inches(0.35), insight, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)
        y += Inches(0.4)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_07_wind_title(prs):
    """Wind Energy Section Title"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#1B3A8C")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "风能"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "风能", font_size=64, color=WHITE, bold=True, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(2.33), Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD_HIGHLIGHT
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.1), Inches(10), Inches(0.8), "Wind Energy", font_size=32, color=TEAL_ACCENT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide)


def slide_08_wind_analysis(prs):
    """Wind Energy Analysis"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8F9FA")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "风能投资分析"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "风能投资分析", font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    stats = [
        ("总投资额", "$67B"),
        ("年增长率", "+58%"),
        ("平均ROI", "10%"),
        ("装机容量", "900 GW")
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.4), card_w, Inches(1.5), label, value)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(12), Inches(0.4), "关键洞察", font_size=24, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)
    insights = [
        "• 海上风电成为增长最快的细分领域，年增长率超过70%",
        "• 涡轮机单机容量突破15MW，大型化趋势显著降低度电成本",
        "• 欧洲和亚太地区是海上风电的主要市场",
        "• 漂浮式风电技术为深远海开发提供新可能"
    ]
    y = Inches(3.7)
    for insight in insights:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y, Inches(12), Inches(0.35), insight, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)
        y += Inches(0.4)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_09_hydro_title(prs):
    """Hydroelectric Section Title"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A2463")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "水力发电"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(10), Inches(1.2), "水力发电", font_size=64, color=WHITE, bold=True, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(2.33), Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD_HIGHLIGHT
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.1), Inches(10), Inches(0.8), "Hydroelectric Power", font_size=32, color=TEAL_ACCENT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide)


def slide_10_hydro_analysis(prs):
    """Hydroelectric Analysis"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8F9FA")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "水力发电投资分析"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "水力发电投资分析", font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    stats = [
        ("总投资额", "$34B"),
        ("年增长率", "+25%"),
        ("平均ROI", "8%"),
        ("装机容量", "1,300 GW")
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.15)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.4), card_w, Inches(1.5), label, value)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(12), Inches(0.4), "关键洞察", font_size=24, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)
    insights = [
        "• 抽水蓄能电站投资快速增长，为电网提供灵活调节能力",
        "• 现有水电站现代化改造和效率提升成为主要投资方向",
        "• 小水电在发展中国家仍有较大增长空间",
        "• 环境影响评估趋严，新项目审批周期延长"
    ]
    y = Inches(3.7)
    for insight in insights:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y, Inches(12), Inches(0.35), insight, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)
        y += Inches(0.4)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_11_other_renewables(prs):
    """Other Renewable Sources"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8F9FA")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "其他可再生能源"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), "其他可再生能源", font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    sources = [
        ("地热能源", "$12B", "+40%", "9%"),
        ("生物质能", "$8B", "+35%", "7%"),
        ("氢能", "$6B", "+75%", "15%"),
        ("海上风电", "$45B", "+52%", "11%")
    ]

    y = Inches(1.4)
    for name, invested, growth, roi in sources:
        add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), y, Inches(3.8), Inches(1.2), name, f"投资额: {invested}\n增长率: {growth}")
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(4.6), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(2), Inches(0.5), roi, font_size=28, color=TEAL_ACCENT, bold=True)
        y += Inches(1.5)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_12_financial_title(prs):
    """Financial Analysis Section Title"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A2463")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "财务分析"
    else:

    gov_card.fill.solid()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.3), Inches(1.6), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.5), "治理 (G)", font_size=24, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(2.33), Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD_HIGHLIGHT
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.1), Inches(10), Inches(0.8), "Thank You", font_size=32, color=TEAL_ACCENT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Q&A 问答环节", font_size=24, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_exec_summary(prs)
    slide_03_market_overview(prs)
    slide_04_investment_trends_pie(prs)
    slide_05_solar_title(prs)
    slide_06_solar_analysis(prs)
    slide_07_wind_title(prs)
    slide_08_wind_analysis(prs)
    slide_09_hydro_title(prs)
    slide_10_hydro_analysis(prs)
    slide_11_other_renewables(prs)
    slide_12_financial_title(prs)
    slide_13_roi_comparison_bar(prs)
    slide_14_cost_reduction_line(prs)
    slide_15_risk_title(prs)
    slide_16_risk_analysis(prs)
    slide_17_competitive_title(prs)
    slide_18_competitive_analysis(prs)
    slide_19_regional_title(prs)
    slide_20_regional_bar(prs)
    slide_21_policy_title(prs)
    slide_22_policy_analysis(prs)
    slide_23_esg_title(prs)
    slide_24_esg_analysis(prs)
    slide_25_green_financing_title(prs)
    slide_26_green_financing_analysis(prs)
